note: Stripe TEST-mode scaffold only — no live account, no live Price IDs, no real charges. Prepared alongside services/never-miss-a-call/index.html so the setup fee + subscription can be wired once a Stripe test account/product exists. The live page does not link to Stripe; its only CTA is the missed-call-audit lead form.

subscription.label: Monthly plan — $297/mo, up to 500 answered minutes included

billing_model.guarantee: 14-day answered-or-refunded — refund setup fee + first month if not satisfied within 14 days

blockers_before_enabling_checkout: Create a Stripe TEST-mode account/workspace (or a test-mode product set inside the existing account) — do not reuse governance/STRIPE_CATALOG.json (that catalog is mode=live, different SKUs, different verify gate)
Create Product + one-time Price ($497) for setup fee in test mode
Create Product + recurring monthly Price ($297/mo) in test mode
Create Product + metered recurring Price ($0.49/min, usage_type=metered) in test mode, attached to the same subscription via a second subscription item
Paste the resulting test-mode price/product IDs into this file
Only after founder sign-off: replace payment_link_url / checkout_type and wire a Stripe Checkout Session (test mode) into the page — do not point at buy.stripe.com live links
